headline: 26-year-old’s health insurance premiums spiked $700 after ACA subsidies ended: ‘Your stomach drops’
summary: With enhanced ACA subsidies expired, health insurance premiums are estimated to more than double for many marketplace enrollees.

raw.headline: 26-year-old’s health insurance premiums spiked $700 after ACA subsidies ended: ‘Your stomach drops’
raw.summary: With enhanced ACA subsidies expired, health insurance premiums are estimated to more than double for many marketplace enrollees.

headline: Mark Cuban Calls $30,000 Corporate Healthcare Burden 'Insane,' Backs Bill To Break Up Big Medicine Giants UNH, CVS, CI
summary: Mark Cuban calls $30K corporate healthcare costs 'insane,' backing a new bill to break up big medicine giants like UNH, CVS, and CI.

raw.headline: Mark Cuban Calls $30,000 Corporate Healthcare Burden 'Insane,' Backs Bill To Break Up Big Medicine Giants UNH, CVS, CI
raw.summary: Mark Cuban calls $30K corporate healthcare costs 'insane,' backing a new bill to break up big medicine giants like UNH, CVS, and CI.
